allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force d:\\CATERING | Select-Object Name; "---git---"; \(Get-Command git\).Source; git --version; "---node---"; node --version; npm --version; \(Get-Command pnpm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)
PowerShell(pnpm --version; "node: $\(node --version\)"; "--- contents of CATERING ---"; Get-ChildItem -Force d:\\CATERING | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell(cd d:\\CATERING; Get-ChildItem -Force d:\\CATERING\\scaffold-tmp | ForEach-Object { Move-Item -LiteralPath $_.FullName -Destination d:\\CATERING -Force }; Remove-Item d:\\CATERING\\scaffold-tmp -Recurse -Force; "--- result ---"; Get-ChildItem -Force d:\\CATERING | Select-Object Name)
PowerShell(cd d:\\CATERING; $env:CI = "true"; pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add button --yes 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25)
PowerShell(cd d:\\CATERING; $env:CI = "true"; pnpm add -D tw-animate-css 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8)
PowerShell(cd d:\\CATERING; $env:CI = "true"; pnpm add clsx tailwind-merge class-variance-authority lucide-react 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 12)
PowerShell(cd d:\\CATERING; "user.name: $\(git config user.name\)"; "user.email: $\(git config user.email\)"; git add -A; git status --short | Select-Object -First 30)
